content.en:
Now, Ye Tian used the Holy Magic Glass Holy Cover and the Golden Light from the Dust, one defense, one attack, and his strength simply skyrocketed, although these two holy arts could not be used for a long time, but the effect was terrifying, enough to deal with many situations.

Moreover, his own combat power surpassed that of the weaker Quadruple Ancestors, so his current strength was already comparable to those powerful Quadruple Ancestors.

"At present, there is still a shortage of resources, we have to go to some forbidden places to obtain resources, otherwise we will not be able to gather the resources to condense the Will Pagoda to the three hundred and sixty-fifth floor!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Subsequently, he learned about some forbidden places through the Voidless Heaven Gate, preferably forbidden places that even many Quadruple Ancestors did not dare to enter, and the resources were very abundant.

Of course, such a forbidden land is definitely not easy to find, after all, if the resources are really abundant, those top quadruple ancestors may dare to enter it, and the forbidden land will be of little value.

"If the Quadruple Ancestor is restricted from entering, but it is very dangerous, the Triple Ancestor enters a place where he is almost certain to die, so it is suitable for me!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

So, he went in this direction to find relevant information.

Finally, on this day, he found a similar place.

"Cloudless!"

This place is considered a forbidden land, but it is not a forbidden place, because the outer part of the cloudless edge belongs to the treasure land, and there is not much danger, and the real dangerous place is the core area.

And the core area is a real forbidden place for the Triple Ancestor, and those who enter it die.

The fourfold primordial ancestor couldn't enter the cloudless end, so the cloudless edge was a treasure land on the periphery, and the inner perimeter was a real forbidden place, and the threefold primordial ancestor didn't dare to enter it.

It is said that the resources in the core area of the Cloudless Rim are very rich, and there are the top Triple Ancestors who have carried countless life-saving things into it for a while, so they still know a little about the situation inside, but once they fall, many life-saving treasures will have to be lost.

Therefore, no Triple Ancestor dared to enter later.

Of course, even with the Glass Holy Cover, it is very dangerous to enter the core area of the Cloudless Rim.

It's not that there are no forces that have done it, a fivefold holy gate specially cultivated a top triple ancestor who has cultivated a glazed holy cover, and entered the core area of the cloudless realm, but it finally fell.

You know, the will clone can't perform holy arts, this fall is directly the true body of the body, once it falls, it really falls, and the loss is so heavy.

The fall of such a demonic Saint Son-level Ancestor directly made the other Fivefold Holy Gates dare not do so.

"Cloudless Boundary, I didn't expect there to be such a place, it's so suitable for me!"

Ye Tian was going to go to the Voidless Realm, of course he didn't follow the Voidless Heavenly Gate, otherwise those Fourfold Ancestors would definitely stop him.

......

The cloudless end is in the Great Domain of the Upper Spirit Primordial Domain, the Five Peaks Domain.

Soon, Ye Tian shuttled to the Five Peaks Domain, and then went to the Cloudless Realm.

Although the periphery of the Cloudless Rim is a treasure land, the fight is also very powerful, and the weak Triple Origin Ancestor does not dare to enter here, otherwise even if it is a will clone, it will be killed quickly, and the loss will be too great.

After Ye Tian came here, he shuttled directly to the core area of the Cloudless Rim.

At this moment, the three top Origin Ancestors tried to intercept Ye Tian.

"Look for death!"

Ye Tianyi waved his hand and directly killed them with three rays of light.

For Ye Tian, these Triple Primordial Ancestor Peak Powerhouses who had only comprehended more than a dozen extreme extremes, even if they had comprehended the Primordial Control Technique, they were still ant-like little people.

Now.

In the three places of the Shangling Origin Domain, the three Primordial Ancestors were all shocked, and they learned that they had found a terrifying Triple Primordial Ancestor by death, and the will clone couldn't even resist, so they were killed in an instant.

This is definitely the Dao of the Fourfold Heavenly Gate, and it may even be the core disciple of the Fivefold Holy Gate.

Soon, Ye Tian came to the vicinity of the core area of the Cloudless Rim.

Wow!

Ye Tian directly entered it.

At this time, some nearby Primordial Ancestors sensed that Ye Tian had entered the core area, and they were immediately shocked.

"Another fool who wants to venture into the core area to find treasures!"

One of the Primordial Ancestors sneered.

There are many such fools, and there is no shortage of peerless geniuses, but they are all dead.

In their opinion, Ye Tian estimated that he would die soon.

......

As soon as he entered the core area of the Cloudless Rim, an invisible force came into effect, as if it was about to shatter Ye Tian's original ancestor's body.

Ye Tian tried to resist with his physical body, but found that he couldn't bear it.

You must know that he has already comprehended more than a hundred extreme extreme paths, which he can't bear, but it is conceivable that the other Triple Ancestors will definitely not be able to bear it, and he may die in an instant.

"You still have to rely on the glass holy cover!"

Ye Tian directly opened the glazed holy cover, constantly resisting the suppression of invisible forces, and then resisted.

"The danger in the core area is definitely not limited to the suppression here, otherwise the Holy Son who has cultivated the Glass Sacred Cover will not die here. Perhaps, like me, that one has also practiced an offensive type of holy art!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

Then Ye Tian opened the copying talent and explored the situation here.

"It's still a lot early!"

Ye Tian was overjoyed.

After all, no one has picked it here for a long time, so the resources here have grown a lot, and the grades are very high, not to mention the triple ancestor, and even the quadruple ancestor has great value.

"If I get all the resources here, maybe I can get all the resources I need among the Triple Ancestors!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

He wanted to condense his own Will Pagoda to the thirty-six and fifteenth floors, and this required resources that other Triple Ancestors couldn't imagine!

Therefore, he is too short of resources, and after the Will Pagoda reaches two hundred floors, I am afraid that every level of the Pagoda will require a huge amount of resources.

Therefore, without enough resources, he didn't know how many years it would take to raise the Pagoda of Will to the top of the three hundred and sixty-fifth floor.

"Close!"

"Close!"

"Close!"

One by one, the resources were taken away by Ye Tian.

Abrupt.

A black shadow crossed over in an instant, and the speed was incomparably fast, almost no less than Ye Tian.

"Kill!"

Ye Tian urged one of his top primordial control skills, the Void Blade!

This was a top-notch primordial control technique that he had created not long ago, containing seventy-two extreme powers, and its power was terrifying.

Burst!

The Void Blade slashed in an instant, directly slashing the black shadow.

Suddenly, a corpse appeared, and it was a strange creature, the other party was covered in black hair, looked like a monkey, but had no tail, and only one eye.

Its aura was only equivalent to the top Triple Ancestor, but its speed here seemed to be unlimited, so it was comparable to Ye Tian's speed.

"Black Cloud Beast!"

This was the information that Ye Tian had detected from the Copying Talent.

Presumably, there are a lot of Black Cloud Beasts here, and if the number reaches a certain level, even if the Holy Son who is inscribed with seventy-two extreme extreme paths has holy arts, he will be surrounded and killed.

After all, if the Holy Art is besieged, it won't last long!

Really.

Ye Tian's copying talent sensed a lot of black cloud beasts, and they emerged one by one.
